summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Social Media Scheduler app. All backend APIs (13/13 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Landing page, Create Post page (3 post types with platform icons), Connections page (9 platforms with mock accounts), Calendar page (monthly view with navigation), and Video Post creation flow all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Social OAuth connections are MOCKED - shows demo data, not real OAuth flow. Settings page clearly indicates this.
App uses Emergent Google Auth for user authentication - working correctly
seed_data_creation: Test user already exists with onboarding_completed=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. Backend APIs: auth, posts CRUD, social-accounts, stats all passing. Frontend pages: /create (3 post types), /accounts (9 platforms), /calendar (monthly view), /create/video (video post form) all working. Social OAuth is MOCKED for demo purposes.

features_tested.create_post_page: ✓ Shows 3 post type cards (Text, Image, Video) with platform icons
features_tested.connections_page: ✓ Displays all 9 platforms (Bluesky, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Pinterest, Threads, TikTok, Twitter, YouTube) with Connect buttons and mock connected accounts
features_tested.calendar_page: ✓ Shows monthly calendar view with navigation arrows and Month/Week toggle
features_tested.video_post_form: ✓ Account selection, media upload area, platform-specific captions, scheduling options all present
features_tested.api_auth: ✓ Login, get current user, unauthorized access handling working
